rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.220 governs model threat assessment team policies for school districts. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 37.220. MODEL THREAT ASSESSMENT TEAM POLICIES AND PROCEDURES.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education safety provision.
